chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4407 of 2022 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on CMA No.18815/2022. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.2, 18 & 26. 3. For orders on CMA No.18816/2022. 4. For orders on CMA No.18817/2022 5. For orders on CMA No.18818/2022. 6. For hearing of main case. 03.08.2022. Mr. Muhammad Ibrar Arain, Advocate for the Petitioner. ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4-6. The Petitioner seeks action against the Respondents in demolishing the construction said to have been undertaken by him on the property of which he professes to be the owner. It is said that such a measure was not preceded by a notice/intimation and it has been sought that the Respondents be directed to compensate the Petitioner in the sum of Rs.176,500,000/- in that regard. The subject of the Petition thus does not fall within the parameters of Article 199 of the Constitution and could only be adjudicated and determined through appropriate proceedings before the competent court of civil jurisdiction. That being so, the instant Petition stands dismissed in limine alongwith pending Misc. Applications, leaving the Petitioner at liberty to avail his remedy before the appropriate forum in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
